prediction.reasoning: Based on ZTS (Zoetis) historical volatility of approximately 25-30% annualized, I applied a geometric Brownian motion model with slight positive drift reflecting the stock's long-term upward trend. The 18-day timeframe represents about 2.5% of a trading year. I assumed daily volatility of ~1.8% and slight positive expected return, generating confidence intervals using normal distribution properties around the point estimate.
